activities.markdown:
# Drum Chart Basics

A drum chart tells you the structure of a song so you can play it on the spot.

**Common chart symbols:**
- **Simile (sim.)** — keep repeating the pattern
- **N.C.** — no cymbal (play only kicks and snare)
- **X** over a measure — improvise a fill
- **D.S. al Coda** — go back to the sign, play to coda
- **Fine** — end of the song

Gig drummers read charts live, often without rehearsal.

activities.question: What does 'simile' (sim.) mean on a drum chart?
activities.explanation: 'Simile' (sim.) tells the drummer to continue the established pattern — you don't need to write out every measure when the groove stays the same.
